payload.title: [MEDIUM] LAST_OWNER guard TOCTOU race can orphan a board
payload.description: invites.js member role-change/remove read ownerCount then mutate non-transactionally. Two concurrent owner-demotions/removals both see count>1 and proceed => 0 owners, board permanently unmanageable. (Invite accept is correctly atomic.) FIX: SELECT ... FOR UPDATE / serializable txn around the guard+write.
